articles.title: Review and setlist: Dropkick Murphys fires up crowd, flames ICE at St. Paddy’s Day kickoff show
articles.description:
“This weekend makes us a better band because we have to play so many songs. Thanks for giving a s—t.”

The post Review and setlist: Dropkick Murphys fires up crowd, flames ICE at St. Paddy’s Day kickoff show appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Dropkick Murphys performed at MGM Music Hall on March 13, 2026, for St. Paddy's Day.
The band emphasized their commitment to social issues, notably criticizing ICE during the show.
Local fans enjoyed a high-energy performance, enhancing Boston's vibrant St. Patrick's Day celebrations.
